ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used in the experiment */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date the experiment was started */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date the experiment was completed */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the experiment */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Detailed parameters used in the experiment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for training and evaluation */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_name FOREIGN KEY ("model_name") REFERENCES models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and architecture */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression, reinforcement learning) */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Detailed architecture of the model (e.g., neural network layers, activation functions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time (in hours, minutes, seconds) when the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hyperparameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value assigned to the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "hyperparameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the feedback relates */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) given by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression, reinforcement learning) */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Detailed architecture of the model (e.g., neural network layers, activation functions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start date of the training session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End date of the training session */,
  "session_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the training session */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for training */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this evaluation metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., user login, data access) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, data access, model update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
